narrative:
Sagamore Hls Twp township has 8,437 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.8%, a modest Republican lean of 2.5 percentage points.
